blocks.text: Lessons noted: blind person/obscure-name spreads are missing (small losses -3 to -7), while high-confidence country/team calls win big (+67, +75). Going forward: only go high-probability when genuinely confident; cap uncertain guesses ~0.15-0.20 to limit downside. The big wins dominate. Let me advance toward the AO draw.
